title: Ashfall
description: Ashfall aims to transform caves using no game breaking mechanics
body:
**_Ashfall aims to transform caves, adding new decorations, generation and utility!_**



![Moss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e72a9209c8948401800e7656ccfc17ec0a0dd0f1_0.webp)

**_Whats New? We have added new moss stone and moss brick variants! A new plant called hanging moss can be found in caves, and is used to craft these new variants!_**


Ashfall now adds over 200 new blocks including 14 new naturally generated stone variants!





![BLOCKS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0907da8863e182b76a3a2fefb6ebd2def231418.png)



            



**Ashfall Now offers a new way to get resources (in a renewable way) using geodes! **


![GEODES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d70a8bd45b579ca6d9566629ea2574767c14633.png)

![GEODES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75a42f973c3be7d7048ecf50b2e8c3e835011350.png)

![GEODES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b666fe7281f00ab0e030020c65b6e90e2fdee05f.png)


**Ashfall has a new underground structure, home of the mining villager, which offers unique trades!
**

![Mining Hut](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9badce547da65bc769b9527c03ac7b4ad97f432.png)

![Mining Hut](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36349127564ffef44399b90d3fd9ef91e8ea7398.png)






**From cobwebs, crystals, dead skeletons, rocksalt, scribed stone, plants and speleothems, plus more. Ashfall has many interesting blocks with hidden features!**

![guide book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6af7861bcc9d997e6e075e60076e0081012fd2de.png)

![guide book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e2f52e08903013b49e8331fd45b8b61c9cd4836.png)

![paxels](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5a73cac692dc295e3337f9894310ad7699c34e8.png)

![Cobwebs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c3e65f78c42bf323c4c68ad39238b94fb69eb38.png)

![Dead Skeleton](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62ec0aa0f1f70ef86e0583d4d64faf5ed151d171.png)

![CAVE GENERATION](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eddef81a9e4073beaa89a8e8aa2e00754d18bc4_0.webp)

**Feel free to include in your modpack!

Send me a link to your mod reveiw so I can feauture it on this mod page!**


![LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd86b2ad630c5005da21d8ca9005da023b63dc69_0.webp)
